message:
feat(macros): add on_delete/on_update attribute parsing (bd-3qq)

Add macro support for referential actions on foreign keys:
- Parse #[sqlmodel(on_delete = "...")] and #[sqlmodel(on_update = "...")]
- Validate action values (NO ACTION, RESTRICT, CASCADE, SET NULL, SET DEFAULT)
- Generate ReferentialAction enum values in FieldInfo

Example:
```rust
#[derive(Model)]
struct Comment {
    #[sqlmodel(foreign_key = "posts.id", on_delete = "CASCADE")]
    post_id: i64,
}
```

Core types (ReferentialAction, FieldInfo fields) implemented by TurquoiseRobin.
Macro parsing implemented by EmeraldSpring.

Closes bd-3qq

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
